title: Non-record: Asymmetric 1/10 Split — 1.1492 pre-quant BPB on 8xH100 (one-line change)
author: ranausmanai

data.description: Asymmetric encoder-decoder split in the hourglass architecture, changing from a default 50/50 split to 1 encoder layer and the rest decoder layers.
Uses XSA as part of the SOTA stack.
Uses BigramHash as part of the SOTA stack.

novel_contributions: One-line asymmetric encoder-decoder split change from num_layers // 2 to 1 encoder layer
Empirical finding that shifting capacity to the decoder improves BPB monotonically across tested configurations
Validation of the asymmetric split on baseline, SOTA RTX 5090, and 8xH100 runs
Reported 1.1492 pre-quant val_bpb on 8xH100 before the run was cut short
